app.subtitle: Local wallet guard
nav.label: Main navigation
dashboard.title: A calm Pearl wallet and mining dashboard.
dashboard.copy: Monitor local wallet state, review guarded sweep decisions, validate balance curves, and keep pool observations in one lightweight desktop view.
curves.title: Balance curve verification
monitor.title: Dry-run guarded monitor
monitor.copy: This preview evaluates sweep readiness without unlocking wallets or broadcasting transactions.
monitor.noDecision: No decision has been made yet.
history.title: Browse address history
history.copy: Filter local observations, mining rewards, and guarded sweep records without exposing private addresses in the repository.
history.search: Search label, direction, amount, or transaction id
pools.title: Mining pool sync
pools.copy: Sync read-only pool observations from fixture data or locally configured mainstream pool endpoints.
verify.thresholdMessage: {count} points crossed the configured sweep threshold in the fixture curve.
verify.reserveMessage: {count} points returned near the configured reserve after sweep decisions.
verify.feeMessage: Future live imports should mark repeated fee-estimate fallback events for manual review.
settings.title: Local application settings
settings.poolLocal: private pool endpoints and API preferences
settings.runtimeLocal: runtime audit data and exported records
dashboard.setupCopy: PearlGuard now starts in normal local mode. Add wallet.config.json or import an audit CSV to populate wallet history and curves.
history.noRows: No address history yet. Import a CSV audit file to browse local records.
